mapper.select: SELECT u.*, d.dpt_name, o.org_name FROM admin_sm_user u LEFT JOIN admin_sm_dpt d ON d.dpt_id = u.dpt_id LEFT JOIN admin_sm_org o ON o.org_id = u.org_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT u.*, d.dpt_name, o.org_name FROM admin_sm_user u LEFT JOIN admin_sm_dpt d ON d.dpt_id = u.dpt_id LEFT JOIN admin_sm_org o ON o.org_id = u.org_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND o.ORG_SEQ LIKE #{orgSeq}
SELECT USER_ID AS userNo, USER_NAME FROM admin_sm_user
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_sm_user SET LAST_LOGIN_TIME= #{lastLoginTime} where USER_ID =#{userId}
UPDATE admin_sm_user SET USER_STS= #{userState} where USER_ID =#{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT T0.login_code as USERID, T0.user_name as USER_NAME, T0.USER_EMAIL as USER_EMAIL, T0.USER_MOBILEPHONE as USER_MOBILEPHONE, T1.ORG_CODE as ORG_ID FROM admin_sm_user T0 JOIN admin_sm_org T1 ON (T0.ORG_ID = T1.ORG_ID) JOIN admin_sm_instu T2 ON (T1.INSTU_ID = T2.INSTU_ID) ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT T0.LOGIN_CODE as USERID, T0.USER_NAME as USERNAME, T0.USER_EMAIL as USEREMAIL, T0.USER_MOBILEPHONE as USERMOBILE, T1.ORG_CODE FROM admin_sm_user T0 JOIN admin_sm_org T1 ON (T0.ORG_ID = T1.ORG_ID) where T0.USER_STS = 'A' AND T1.ORG_CODE = #{orgId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}

select T1.LOGIN_CODE as USERID, T1.USER_NAME as USERNAME, T1.USER_EMAIL as USEREMAIL, T1.USER_MOBILEPHONE as USERMOBILE from admin_sm_user T1 join admin_sm_dpt T2 on T1.DPT_ID=T2.DPT_ID where T1.USER_STS = 'A' and T2.DPT_CODE = #{deptId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}

select T1.LOGIN_CODE as USERID, T1.USER_NAME as USERNAME, T1.USER_EMAIL as USEREMAIL, T1.USER_MOBILEPHONE as USERMOBILE from admin_sm_user T1, (select T2.USER_ID from admin_sm_duty T3, admin_sm_user_duty_rel T2 where T3.DUTY_ID = T2.DUTY_ID and T3.DUTY_CODE = #{dutyId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}) BB where T1.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID and T1.User_Sts = 'A'

select T1.LOGIN_CODE as USERID, T1.USER_NAME as USERNAME, T1.USER_EMAIL as USEREMAIL, T1.USER_MOBILEPHONE as USERMOBILE from admin_sm_user T1, (select T2.USER_ID from admin_sm_role T3, admin_sm_user_role_rel T2 where T3.ROLE_ID = T2.ROLE_ID and T3.ROLE_CODE = #{roleId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}) BB where T1.USER_ID = BB.USER_ID and T1.User_Sts = 'A'

SELECT T0.LOGIN_CODE as USERID, T0.USER_NAME as USERNAME, T0.USER_EMAIL as USEREMAIL, T0.USER_MOBILEPHONE as USERMOBILE FROM admin_sm_user T0 where T0.USER_STS = 'A' and T0.LOGIN_CODE = #{userId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
select u.org_id, r.role_id from admin_sm_user u LEFT JOIN admin_sm_user_role_rel r on u.user_id = r.user_id where u.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT DATA_TENANT_ID as tenantid ,COUNT(DATA_TENANT_ID) as tenantcount FROM admin_sm_user GROUP BY DATA_TENANT_ID
SELECT user_id,user_code,login_code FROM admin_sm_user where user_code=#{userCode} or login_code=#{loginCode}

SELECT T0.USER_ID,T0.LOGIN_CODE,T0.USER_NAME,T0.USER_CODE,T0.DPT_ID,T0.USER_SEX,T0.CERT_TYPE,T0.DEADLINE,T0.CERT_NO,T0.ORG_ID,T0.USER_STS,T0.LAST_CHG_USR,T0.LAST_CHG_DT,T1.ORG_NAME FROM admin_sm_user T0 LEFT JOIN admin_sm_org T1 ON T0.ORG_ID=T1.ORG_ID ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT t2.ORG_ID,t2.ORG_NAME,t4.ROLE_ID,t4.ROLE_NAME FROM admin_sm_user t1 LEFT JOIN admin_sm_org t2 ON t1.ORG_ID = t2.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN admin_sm_user_role_rel t3 ON t3.USER_ID = t1.USER_ID LEFT JOIN admin_sm_role t4 ON t4.ORG_ID = t1.ORG_ID AND t4.ROLE_ID = t3.ROLE_ID WHERE t1.LOGIN_CODE = #{loginCode} UNION SELECT t3.ORG_ID,t3.ORG_NAME,t5.ROLE_ID,t5.ROLE_NAME FROM admin_sm_user_mgr_org t1 LEFT JOIN admin_sm_user t2 ON t2.USER_ID = t1.USER_ID LEFT JOIN admin_sm_org t3 ON t3.ORG_ID = t1.ORG_ID LEFT JOIN admin_sm_user_role_rel t4 ON t4.USER_ID = t2.USER_ID LEFT JOIN admin_sm_role t5 ON t5.ORG_ID = t1.ORG_ID AND t5.ROLE_ID = t4.ROLE_ID WHERE t2.LOGIN_CODE = #{loginCode}
